subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Bear thou witness that there is none other God but Him, and verily that which speaketh is the Book of Eternity unto the Supreme Concourse [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا علی ان اشهد انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ینطق انه لکتاب البقاء للملا الاعلی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
